zh.lifeSummary: 當John Corperew於1620年出生在美國紐約州艾利布費阿洛時，他的父親Michael Koerper38歲，母親Cunigunda Neuner30歲。他於大約1639年與Mary Lockhart結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1700年9月18日在美國維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corperew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an Anglicized form of Walloon Carpreau, a nickname from Old French carprel, carpreau, a diminutive form of Old Picard carpre ‘carp’, perhaps for a fish merchant. Compare Karper .

History: Evidence of family historian Susan Thompson suggests that John Corperhew or Corperew, who is documented in 1681 and 1700 (in his will) as a resident in Norfolk County, VA, might be descended from the family of David Corporew, who was a merchant of the French church in 1582-3 in Billingsgate (the chief ward of the fishmongers in London). He may be identical with David Carpreau, named (with John Carpreau) in 1586 as one of a number of "Low Countrymen in London". Children of David and Ester Carpreau were baptized in 1604 and 1609 at the French Huguenot Church in Threadneedle Street, London. A London record of 1618 listing Protestant exiles from France names “David Carpreau, merchant, aged about 60, born at Tournai” (in Wallonia).

variants.name: Karper
meanings: German and Jewish (from Poland and Germany): derivative of   Karp  . Compare   Carper  .

Dutch: metonymic occupational name from Middle Dutch carpere ‘carp’, for someone who catches or breeds carp in a hatchery, or a nickname for someone as lively as a carp can be, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a carp.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Corperew was born in 1620, in Buffalo, Erie, New York, United States, his father, Michael Koerper, was 38 and his mother, Cunigunda Neuner, was 30. He married Mary Lockhart about 1639. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 September 1700, in Norfolk, Virginia, United States, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Corperew est né en 1620, à Buffalo, Erie, New York, États-Unis, son père, Michael Koerper, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Cunigunda Neuner, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary Lockhart environ 1639. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1700, à Norfolk, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: John Corperew(이)가 1620년 미국 뉴욕 주 에리 버팔로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael Koerper(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Cunigunda Neuner(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1639년 Mary Lockhart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1700년 9월 18일 미국 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Corperew родился в 1620 г. в местности буффалоу, эри, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Michael Koerper было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Cunigunda Neuner, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Lockhart около 1639 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 сентября 1700 г. в местности норфолк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет.
